'''鈭歴-sh-n''' ('''kasashan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:eccentricate|eccentricate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-sh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eccentricate|eccentricate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-sh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kasashan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisashan|thisashan]] || [[word:jisashan|jisashan]] || [[word:shisashan|shisashan]] || [[word:kisashan|kisashan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusashan|thuthusashan]] || [[word:jujusashan|jujusashan]] || [[word:shushusashan|shushusashan]] || [[word:kukusashan|kukusashan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusashan|thusashan]] || [[word:jusashan|jusashan]] || [[word:shusashan|shusashan]] || [[word:kusashan|kusashan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusashan|thusashan]] || [[word:jusashan|jusashan]] || [[word:shusashan|shusashan]] || [[word:kusashan|kusashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesashan|thesashan]] || [[word:jesashan|jesashan]] || [[word:shesashan|shesashan]] || [[word:kesashan|kesashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosashan|thothosashan]] || [[word:jojosashan|jojosashan]] || [[word:shoshosashan|shoshosashan]] || [[word:kokosashan|kokosashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosashan|thosashan]] || [[word:josashan|josashan]] || [[word:shosashan|shosashan]] || [[word:kosashan|kosashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosashan|thosashan]] || [[word:josashan|josashan]] || [[word:shosashan|shosashan]] || [[word:kosashan|kosashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙sashan|th忙sashan]] || [[word:j忙sashan|j忙sashan]] || [[word:sh忙sashan|sh忙sashan]] || [[word:k忙sashan|k忙sashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasashan|thathasashan]] || [[word:jajasashan|jajasashan]] || [[word:shashasashan|shashasashan]] || [[word:kakasashan|kakasashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasashan|thasashan]] || [[word:jasashan|jasashan]] || [[word:shasashan|shasashan]] || [[word:kasashan|kasashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasashan|thasashan]] || [[word:jasashan|jasashan]] || [[word:shasashan|shasashan]] || [[word:kasashan|kasashan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasashan|shasashan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasashan|goshasashan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasashan|gokishasashan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasashan眉|shasashan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasashankn眉|goshasashankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasashan眉|gokishasashan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasashansh毛|shasashansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasashanksh毛|goshasashanksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasashansh毛|gokishasashansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasashanro|shasashanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasashankro|goshasashankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasashanro|gokishasashanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasashanmu|shasashanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasashankmu|goshasashankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasashanmu|gokishasashanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasashansher|shasashansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasashanksher|goshasashanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasashansher|gokishasashansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasashang|shasashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasashankng|goshasashankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasashang|gokishasashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasashanya|shasashanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasashankya|goshasashankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasashanya|gokishasashanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasashanyam|shasashanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasashankyam|goshasashankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasashanyam|gokishasashanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasashan眉sh毛|shasashan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasashankn眉sh毛|goshasashankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasashan眉sh毛|gokishasashan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasashan眉ro|shasashan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasashankn眉ro|goshasashankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasashan眉ro|gokishasashan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasashan眉mu|shasashan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasashankn眉mu|goshasashankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasashan眉mu|gokishasashan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasashansh毛n眉|shasashansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasashanksh毛n眉|goshasashanksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasashansh毛n眉|gokishasashansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasashansh毛ro|shasashansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasashanksh毛ro|goshasashanksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasashansh毛ro|gokishasashansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasashansh毛mu|shasashansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasashanksh毛mu|goshasashanksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasashansh毛mu|gokishasashansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasashanron眉|shasashanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasashankron眉|goshasashankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasashanron眉|gokishasashanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasashanrosh毛|shasashanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasashankrosh毛|goshasashankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasashanrosh毛|gokishasashanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasashanromu|shasashanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasashankromu|goshasashankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasashanromu|gokishasashanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasashanmun眉|shasashanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasashankmun眉|goshasashankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasashanmun眉|gokishasashanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasashanmush毛|shasashanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasashankmush毛|goshasashankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasashanmush毛|gokishasashanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasashanmuro|shasashanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasashankmuro|goshasashankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasashanmuro|gokishasashanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
